name: Freezer Mix Sloppy Joes
recipeInstructions:
1. Dip the container of frozen mix into hot water just to loosen.
2. In a 2-quart saucepan, heat the frozen mix, water, celery, catsup, brown sugar, and Worcestershire sauce until boiling.
3. Reduce heat and cover; simmer, stirring frequently, for about 15 minutes or until the mix is partially thawed.
4. Uncover and continue to simmer, stirring occasionally, until the desired consistency is reached, about 10 more minutes.
5. Spoon the mixture onto the bottom halves of the buns.
6. Top with the remaining halves.
